creator: hnokubi@yyy.or.jp
text:
Configuration seems to be wrong.
Xbm2ikon has bug?

Fix: According to comments, `REVORDER' compile option seems to be needed.
But, without this compile option, faces seems to work fine.
(I'm not sure about this.)
How-To-Repeat: 
% xbm2ikon face.xbm

Without patch, above command generates output like this.
